title: Vežba 42

questions.text:
Tim za podršku objavio je kratki vodič za rešavanje problema pri pokretanju računara:

Having boot issues?

Troubleshooting computer issues can feel overwhelming, but understanding them can make the process easier. Here's a simple step-by-step checklist for diagnosing and fixing computer boot problems:

1. Check the power connection: If the power cable isn't securely connected, the computer won't turn on.

2. Inspect the BIOS: If the BIOS is corrupted, the system might fail to boot. You may need to reset or update it.

3. Examine the hard drive: If the hard drive is failing, the operating system won't load. Run diagnostic tools to confirm.

4. Update drivers: If the software crashes, it could be due to outdated or incompatible drivers. Always keep drivers updated to prevent this.

5. Watch out for memory leaks: If the application has memory leaks, it can slow down or crash the system. Look for signs like freezing or lagging.

Following these steps can help you identify the root cause and get things running smoothly again.

Koja je prva korak za rešavanje problema sa negašenim računarom?

answers.feedback: Provera BIOS-a je drugi korak nakon što se uveriš da je napajanje ispravno povezano.
Dijagnostički alati se pominju za hard disk, ali prvi korak je provera napajanja.
Sahihisho la madereva linapendekezwa baadaye kwa ajili ya kurekebisha matatizo ya programu, si matatizo ya kuanzisha kompyuta.

instructions: Pročitajte tekst i odgovorite na pitanje koje se nalazi ispod.
explanation:
Vodič počinje proverom power connection, naglašavajući da if the power cable isn't securely connected, the computer won't turn on. Ovaj osnovni korak je važan kako bi se najpre isključili jednostavni uzroci pre prelaska na složeniju dijagnostiku.

Lista za proveru namerno počinje ovim korakom jer su problemi sa napajanjem česti i lako se rešavaju.

Obrati pažnju na deo u kojem vodič povezuje simptom (computer won't turn on) sa rešenjem (check the power connection), naglašavajući važnost započinjanja osnovnim koracima rešavanja problema.
